title: jasminum angustifolium
intro: Jasminum angustifolium, also known as narrow-leaved jasmine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Oleaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. The leaves and flowers of Jasminum angustifolium can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
